tree.name: GG Jackson
tree.note: South Carolina forward; drafted 45th overall by Memphis using pick acquired from Minnesota

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#45)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Walker Kessler and TyTy Washington Jr. to Minnesota for Jake LaRavia and a 2023 2nd round draft pick (GG Jackson, #45, MIN own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick acquired from MIN in Kessler/Washington trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Walker Kessler
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Pick originally from Utah as part of the Mike Conley trade (Jul 6, 2019); conditional, conveyed in 2022 as #22
assetsGivenUp.note: Auburn center, drafted 22nd overall with UTA's pick from Conley trade, sent to MIN

assetsGivenUp.name: Mike Conley
assetsGivenUp.note: Ohio State guard, drafted 4th overall by Memphis in 2007

assetsGivenUp.name: TyTy Washington Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky guard, drafted 29th overall by Memphis with MEM's own 2022 1st round pick, sent to MIN
